message: Stack overflow (combined frame size exceeds BPF stack limit)
notes: cause: BPF stack frames are limited to 512 bytes total (across all called functions in a tail-call-free call chain). The verifier rejects programs whose summed stack usage exceeds this limit. The cause is usually a large local struct or array that should live in a map or ringbuf reservation instead.

; let frame: [u8; 512] = ...; call inner(&frame);
0: R1=ctx() R10=fp0
1: (85) call pc+10
combined stack size of 3 calls is 600. Too large (verification failed)
suggest: Move large local records into maps (`BPF_MAP_TYPE_PERCPU_ARRAY` keyed by 0 is the canonical scratch-pad) or ringbuf reservations. Avoid recursive helpers; prefer flat call graphs so the verifier's combined-stack accounting stays bounded.
